title: Shaggy Sweet Venezuelan Rice Stew
description: A buttery, shaggy stew that satisfies midnight cravings, blending peach juice and yuzu zest for a subtle citrus sweetness.
instructions: Heat the kazan cauldron over medium heat and melt the butter with olive oil until foamy.
Add the chopped onion, garlic, carrot, and bell pepper, sautéing until the vegetables soften, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes to bloom the flavors.
Pour in the vegetable broth, peach juice, and yuzu zest, then bring the mixture to a gentle boil.
Add the rice, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the rice with a wooden spoon, ensuring a shaggy, loose texture.
Taste and season with salt and pepper to balance the sweetness.
Remove from heat, stir in fresh cilantro, and let the stew rest for 5 minutes.
Serve hot directly from the kazan, garnished with extra cilantro if desired.
Enjoy a bowl that feels like a midnight dessert with a savory core.
